newsArray.title: Doublé inédit, territoire sacré et Christophe Kerbrat : pourquoi la FAB Cup 2026, organisée ce samedi à Plabennec, s’annonce historique
newsArray.description: Plabennec (29) s’apprête à vibrer au rythme de la FAB Cup 2026. Entre quête d’un doublé historique, retour aux sources et émotions fortes, le « All Star Game » du foot amateur breton promet une édition, une nouvelle fois, mémorable.
creator: nicolas tavares

newsArray.title: Cyle Larin strikes late as Canada earn historic 1-1 draw against Bosnia in World Cup opener
newsArray.description: Substitute Cyle Larin scored late to earn Canada a 1-1 draw against Bosnia and Herzegovina in their World Cup opener. The result gave Canada their first-ever point in tournament history after a spirited comeback in front of home fans.
creator: ians

newsArray.title: U.S. Soccer Fans Flock to World Cup Match, Highlighting Sport's Growing Popularity
newsArray.description: Thousands of American fans gathered in Inglewood, California, to cheer on the U.S. men's national soccer team during its World Cup home opener against Paraguay. The event, part of a tournament hosted in the United States, showcased a vibrant, passionate fanbase and illustrated soccer's rising cultural footprint in a country where it has traditionally been overshadowed by other sports. Attendees cited family traditions, immigrant heritage, and a growing love for the game as reasons for their enthusiasm.
creator: kprc2
